'''zavadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobber|nobber]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobber|nobber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zavadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zævædhæth|zævædhæth]] || [[word:zævædhæj|zævædhæj]] || [[word:zævædhæsh|zævædhæsh]] || [[word:zævædhæ|zævædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavavadhath|zavavadhath]] || [[word:zavavadhaj|zavavadhaj]] || [[word:zavavadhash|zavavadhash]] || [[word:zavavadha|zavavadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavadhath|zavadhath]] || [[word:zavadhaj|zavadhaj]] || [[word:zavadhash|zavadhash]] || [[word:zavadha|zavadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavafdhath|zavafdhath]] || [[word:zavafdhaj|zavafdhaj]] || [[word:zavafdhash|zavafdhash]] || [[word:zavafdhaf|zavafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zavadhatha|zavadhatha]] || [[word:zavadhaja|zavadhaja]] || [[word:zavadhasha|zavadhasha]] || [[word:zavadhaka|zavadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zavadhath|zavadhath]] || [[word:zavadhaj|zavadhaj]] || [[word:zavadhash|zavadhash]] || [[word:zavadha|zavadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zavadhathal|zavadhathal]] || [[word:zavadhajal|zavadhajal]] || [[word:zavadhashal|zavadhashal]] || [[word:zavadhakal|zavadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zavadhathatha|zavadhathatha]] || [[word:zavadhajaja|zavadhajaja]] || [[word:zavadhashasha|zavadhashasha]] || [[word:zavadhaka|zavadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zavadhathan|zavadhathan]] || [[word:zavadhajan|zavadhajan]] || [[word:zavadhashan|zavadhashan]] || [[word:zavadhakan|zavadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zavadhathaoro|zavadhathaoro]] || [[word:zavadhajaoro|zavadhajaoro]] || [[word:zavadhashaoro|zavadhashaoro]] || [[word:zavadhakaoro|zavadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
